to.description: The destination stream, or a comma-separated list containing the usernames (emails) of the recipients. Choose from the list, or specify IDs using an expression.

stream.description: The destination stream, or a comma-separated list containing the usernames (emails) of the recipients. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

topic.description: The topic of the message. Only required if type is stream, ignored otherwise. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

propagateMode.description: Which message(s) should be edited: just the one indicated in message_id, messages in the same topic that had been sent after this one, or all of them

topic.description: The topic of the message. Only required for stream messages.

additionalFieldsJson.description: JSON format parameters for stream creation

subscriptions.description: A list of dictionaries containing the the key name and value specifying the name of the stream to subscribe. If the stream does not exist a new stream is created.

announce.description: If announce is True and one of the streams specified in subscriptions has to be created (i.e. doesnt exist to begin with), an announcement will be made notifying that a new stream was created.

authorizationErrorsFatal.description: Whether authorization errors (such as when the requesting user is not authorized to access a private stream) should be considered fatal or not. When True, an authorization error is reported as such. When set to False, the returned JSON payload indicates that there was an authorization error, but the response is still considered a successful one.

historyPublicToSubscribers.description: Whether the streams message history should be available to newly subscribed members, or users can only access messages they actually received while subscribed to the stream

inviteOnly.description: Whether the streams specified in subscriptions are invite-only or not

principals.description: A list of email addresses of the users that will be subscribed/unsubscribed to the streams specified in the subscriptions argument. If not provided, then the requesting user/bot is subscribed.

streamPostPolicy.description: Policy for which users can post messages to the stream

includeAllActive.description: Whether to include all active streams. The user must have administrative privileges to use this parameter.

includeDefault.description: Whether to include all default streams for the users realm

includeOwnersubscribed.description: Whether the user is a bot, include all streams that the bots owner is subscribed to

includePublic.description: Whether to include all public streams

includeSubscribed.description: Whether to include all streams that the user is subscribed to

includeSubscribers.description: Whether each returned stream object should include a subscribers field containing a list of the user IDs of its subscribers

isAnnouncementOnly.description: Whether the stream is limited to announcements

description.description: The new description for the stream

isPrivate.description: Whether the stream is a private stream

newName.description: The new name for the stream

clientGravatar.description: Whether the client supports computing gravatars URLs. If enabled, avatar_url will be included in the response only if there is a Zulip avatar, and will be null for users who are using gravatar as their avatar.

includeCustomProfileFields.description: Whether the client wants custom profile field data to be included in the response

isAdmin.description: Whether the target user is an administrator

isGuest.description: Whether the target user is a guest

profileData.description: A dictionary containing the to be updated custom profile field data for the user

id.description: ID of custom profile data value
ID of custom profile data value

email.description: The email address of the new user

fullName.description: The full name of the new user

password.description: The password of the new user

shortName.description: The short name of the new user. Not user-visible.

userId.description: The ID of user to deactivate
